violations.text: Food items in the Pizza Area reach-in cooler were observed held at 44-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was adjusted to colder temperature at time of inspection. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The stacked 2 door reach-in cooler in the pizza prep area was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 to 47 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 44-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was adjusted at time of inspection and observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit ambient temperature. Per the PIC, unit is to be serviced or replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Ceiling tiles and tile grid system in the downstairs prep area were observed to be sagging and in need adjustment. Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The wall behind the dish pre-flush area and the ceiling tiles in the basement food prep area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026
